title: quercus × rehderi
intro: Quercus × rehderi, also known as Rehder's oak or hybrid white oak, is a rare hybrid of the white oak (Quercus alba) and the Chinese white oak (Quercus acutissima). It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which are beneficial in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Quercus × rehderi include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
